name: Frozen Graham Custard
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease the freezing tray thoroughly.
2. Coat the sides and bottom of the tray with half the graham cracker crumbs, reserving the remainder for topping.
3. Beat the eggs. Add sugar and vanilla. Continue beating until the sugar is dissolved.
4. Add lemon juice to chilled milk and whip until stiff.
5. Fold in the egg mixture and pour into the freezing tray at once. Sprinkle remaining cracker crumbs over top.
6. Freeze until firm.
7. Cut into squares.
